brandContext: Leapmotor is an electric vehicle brand. Translate concise CMS fragments for Leapmotor website pages, product pages, offers, forms, navigation, legal notices, and CTAs.
styleGuide: Keep model names, trim names, vehicle codes, measurements, charging units, warranty numbers, and legal references unchanged unless the locale convention requires punctuation or spacing changes.
Use clear automotive retail language. CTAs should sound native and concise.
Do not expand or invent claims that are not present in the source.

terms.note: Electric vehicle. Use the common target-locale automotive term.
Vehicle driving range, not a product selection range.
Use the target-locale automotive retail expression.
